changes: Guardian will no longer have an effect on targets interacting with an object.
Resolved an issue wherein the Undead Redemption status effect granted by the action Eventide prohibited movement under certain conditions.

new_content.name: Somehow Further Hildibrand Adventures: Lunar Conspiracy
A Key to the Past
new_content.description: Quest to unlock the variant dungeon.

new_content.name: The Café at the End of the Universe
The Sil'dihn Subterrane
new_content.description: A variant dungeon where players follow story threads in the underground waterways of Sil'dih.

new_content.name: Another Sil'dihn Subterrane
new_content.description: A criterion dungeon requiring a party of 1 tank, 1 healer, and 2 DPS.

new_content.name: Another Sil'dihn Subterrane (Savage)
new_content.description: A high-difficulty version of the criterion dungeon.

new_content.name: Omicron tribal quests
new_content.description: New tribal quests for Disciples of the Land.

new_content.name: V&C Dungeon Finder
new_content.description: A new system used to register for variant and criterion dungeons.

new_content.name: Quest Sync
new_content.description: Automatic level adjustment system for Omicron tribal quests.

new_content.name: Variant Actions
new_content.description: Special actions available within variant dungeons to allow for greater freedom of role choices.

housing.name: Blooming Garden Table
housing.description: Bask in the beauty of spring year-round with this quaint outdoor table.

housing.name: Sil'dihn Chair
housing.description: A wooden chair crafted in the Sil'dihn style.

housing.name: Sil'dihn Kitchen Shelf
housing.description: A Sil'dihn-style shelving unit for storing kitchenware and utensils.

housing.name: Sharlayan Chair
housing.description: A dignified chair for the dignified arse.

housing.name: Enigma Partition
housing.description: A partition devised by the Illuminati, replete with whirlycogs.

housing.name: Sil'dihn Side Table
housing.description: A small table crafted in the Sil'dihn style.

housing.name: Sharlayan Desk
housing.description: A scholarly furnishing of the pretenti─er, elegant Sharlayan style.

housing.name: Sharlayan Sink
housing.description: A large washbasin of the sort popular in the Northern Empty.

housing.name: Dragonstar aux Marrons
housing.description: An ode to the Dragonstar, in dessert form. Fittingly, perhaps, this edible delight is a reimagining of the Sohm Al tart.

housing.name: Sil'dihn Banner
housing.description: A striking banner emblazoned with the symbol of the once-prosperous city-state of Sil'dih.

housing.name: Tatami Loft
housing.description: An elegant space perfect for tea, repose, or risking one's life while playing karuta.

housing.name: Sharlayan Rug
housing.description: A large rug bearing a swirling Sharlayan motif.
